style_guidelines: Reply in natural, polite Myanmar language.
Be concise and practical; prefer 1-3 sentences.
Do not include meta explanations about translation.
Keep proper nouns consistent (for example, place names).
If a policy value is unknown, use placeholders like {{value}} or ask for booking details.

schema.user_my: string, user utterance in Myanmar (code-mix allowed)
schema.assistant_my: string, ideal assistant reply in Myanmar
schema.tags: array<string>, short labels such as policy/booking/code_mix

entry_template.user_my: Cancel fee ရှိလား
entry_template.assistant_my: ဟုတ်ကဲ့၊ ပယ်ဖျက်ချိန်ပေါ်မူတည်ပြီး cancellation fee ရှိနိုင်ပါတယ်။ လူကြီးမင်း၏ booking date ပေးပါက တိတိကျကျ စစ်ဆေးပေးနိုင်ပါတယ်။
entry_template.assistant_en: Yes, a cancellation fee may apply depending on timing. If you share your booking date, I can check the exact details.

notes: Keep at least 20% as evaluation-only data and do not include those rows in prompt examples or fine-tuning.
